patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952). Visit diagnoses documented 06/30/2023 include Mixed dyslipidemia (primary), essential hypertension (benign), postoperative anemia, unspecified anemia, and leg pain. Abnormal laboratory results from 07/03/2023 include: Iron 41(L) ug/dL, Iron Saturation 15(L) %, Ferritin 266.8(H) ng/mL, eGFRCKD-EPI 58(L) ml/min/1.73m2, Triglycerides 158(H) mg/dL, VLDLCholesterolCal 32(H) mg/dL, NonHDLChol. 94 mg/dL. Other labs: sodium 140 mmol/L, potassium 4.0 mmol/L, chloride 108(H) mmol/L, creatinine 0.96 mg/dL, glucose 94 mg/dL, calcium 9.5 mg/dL, TSHUltraSensitive 1.320 mIU/mL. Social history: former cigarette smoker (quit 1991), not currently drinking. Primary care provider listed: Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP-General FamilyMedicine).
